output.code: import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, textwrap, itertools, difflib, math, random
import json, pathlib, re, unicodedata, difflib, math, itertools, collections, pprint, os, sys, textwrap
import json, os, re, unicodedata, difflib, itertools, collections, math, textwrap, pprint, pathlib, random

import json, os, re, unicodedata, difflib, itertools, collections, math, textwrap, pprint, pathlib, random

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    q = json.load(f)

len(q), list(q[0].keys())[:5]

def normalize(s):
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'[\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', s)  # remove diacritics and tatweel etc
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

orig = "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ رُسُلًا إِلَى عَادٍ وَثَمُودَ وَجِتُّ وَيُّ وَتُغْمَا وَقَوْمُ لُوطٍ وَعَادٌ وَثَمُودُ وَأَكثَرُ مِن قَرْيَةٍ جَاوَزْنَاهَا وَمَا كَانَ عَهْدُ النَبِيِّينَ عِندَنَا بِغُلَطٍ"
norig = normalize(orig)
norig[:200]

# Search for verses containing segments like "ولقد ارسلنا من قبلك رسلا"
candidates = []
for v in q:
    n = normalize(v['ayah_text'])
    if 'ولقد ارسلنا من قبلك رسلا' in n or ('ولقد ارسلنا رسلا من قبلك' in n):
        candidates.append(v)
len(candidates)
[(c['surah_id'], c['ayah_id'], c['ayah_text']) for c in candidates]

# Search for ayat mentioning عاد and ثمود together
res_at = []
for v in q:
    n = normalize(v['ayah_text'])
    if 'عاد' in n and 'ثمود' in n:
        res_at.append(v)
len(res_at)
[(v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in res_at]

# Search for ayat containing "قوم لوط" with عاد ثمود nearby
res = []
for v in q:
    n = normalize(v['ayah_text'])
    if 'قوم لوط' in n and ('عاد' in n or 'ثمود' in n):
        res.append(v)
[(v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in res]

# Let's show 38:12 too
[v for v in q if v['surah_id']==38 and v['ayah_id'] in [12,13,14]]
